reviews.comment:
Lugar especial para llenar tu tanque por que viene acompañado de excelente atencion

(Translated by Google)
A special place to fill up your tank because it comes with excellent service.

reviews.comment:
La verdad mientras pagas el servicio de acá todo bien la cosa cambia cuando los llama para un auxilio, hay te das cuenta que son usureros

(Translated by Google)
The truth is, while you're paying for the service here everything's fine, things change when you call them for help, that's when you realize they're loan sharks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkcjlIaXB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio por parte de los playeros. No es la YPF más linda  pero para ir a cargar nafta es suficiente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendants. It's not the prettiest YPF, but it's perfectly adequate for filling up.

reviews.comment:
La peor atención de todo mar del plata. Hace años tienen una paja para atender. Te lleva medio dia.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service in all of Mar del Plata. They've been incredibly slow with customer service for years. It takes half a day.
